folio.label: 32v
folio.l: ñemen on fote , and comunes many on
With shorte staues , thikke as they may gon
Pipes trompes , Nakeres Clariones
That in the bataiÂ , blowen blody sownes
The paleys ful of peeple , vp and doun
Here thre , there , X , holdyng here questiou~
Diuynyng of theise Thebans , knygútes two
So~me seyden thus , somö seyden it shal be so
So~me heldyn witú hi~ , with the blak berde
Some with the balled , Some w the thikke herede
So~me seide he loked grym , and he wold fygút
He hath a sparthe , of twenty pound of wygút
Thus was the halle , ful of dyuynyng
Longe after the Sonne , gan vp spryng
¢ The grete Theseus , of his slep a waked
With mynstralsie , and noise æ was maked
He held ©et the chaumbres , of his paleys riche
Til æat the Thebans knygútes , bothe I liche
Houndred , weren in to the paleys fet
Duke Theseus , is at the wyndowe set
Arrayed , rigút as he were , a god in trone
The peeple preseth , thederward ful sone
Hym for to sen , and don hxheyhxey reuäence

note.notetxt: hey reuäence1673 A space marker separates these two words.MP
hey1673ey is written on an erasure.ODR

folio.l: And eke to herken , his hest , and his sentence
¢ An heraud on a skaffold , made an oo
Til al the noyse of the peeple , was I do
And whan he saw , the peeple of noyse al stille
Thus shewed he , the mygúty Dukes wylle
¢ The lord hatú , of heye discreciou~
Considered , that it were destrucciou~
To gentil blode , to fighten in the gyse
Of mortal bataille , now in this emprise
Wherfore to shapen , that they shal nat deye
He wol his First purpos , modifie
¢ Noman æäfore , vp peyne of losse of lyf
No manä shote , ne pollax , ne short knyf
In to the lystes sende , or theder bryng
Ne short swerd for to steke , with poynt bityng
Ne noman ne drawe , ne bere it by his syde
Ne noman shal , vn to his felawe ryde
But oo cours , with a sharp I grounde spere
Foyne if hi~ list , on fote hi~ self to were
And he æ is at myschef , shal be take
And nou©t slayn , but be brou©t vn to æe stake
That shal ben ordeyned , on either syde
